title: 3SE Ontology Property
description: Represents an rdf:Property defined in the 3SE ontology. Used to describe typed relations between roles and concepts (e.g. isResponsibleFor, isAccountableFor, isSupporting). Expressed as a JSON-LD-ready document.

@context.description: JSON-LD context URI. Must reference the canonical context document for this schema.

@id.description: The globally unique IRI identifying this property. Must start with the canonical properties base IRI.

title.description: rdfs:label — The camelCase name of the property (e.g. isResponsibleFor).

description.description: rdfs:comment — A human-readable definition of the property's semantics.

status.description: 3SE editorial status of this concept entry.

domain.description: rdfs:domain — The class of subjects this property applies to. Should be a URI.

range.description: rdfs:range — The class of objects this property relates to. May be a URI or a prefixed name (e.g. skos:Concept).

subPropertyOf.description: rdfs:subPropertyOf — The parent properties this property specialises.

inverseOf.description: owl:inverseOf — The parent properties this property inverses.

isReferencedBy.description: dcterms:isReferencedBy — IRIs of bibliographic resources (bibo:Document) that cite or reference this property.

entryCreated.description: dcterms:created — ISO 8601 date on which this concept entry was first created.

entryModified.description: dcterms:modified — ISO 8601 date on which this concept entry was last modified.

entryCreator.description: dcterms:creator — The agent(s) who originally created this concept entry.

entryContributor.description: dcterms:contributor — Agent(s) who contributed to this concept entry after its initial creation.

agent.description: A foaf:Agent — a person, organisation, or software agent.

@id.description: IRI of the agent (e.g. ORCID, WebID, GitHub profile URL). Maps to foaf:Agent @id.

name.description: foaf:name — Full name or display name of the agent.

mbox.description: foaf:mbox — Email address of the agent.
